.file-embed.background: rgb(250, 244, 237) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(250, 244, 237) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(255, 250, 243) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

a.external-link[data-tooltip-position=\".background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat-x scroll 0px 100% / 5px 5px padding-box border-box

a.internal-link.is-unresolved[data-href=.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat-x scroll 0px 100% / 5px 5px padding-box border-box

a.internal-link[data-href=\"callouts\"][.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat-x scroll 0px 100% / 5px 5px padding-box border-box

blockquote.background: rgb(250, 244, 237) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, #fffaf3 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#fffaf3, color-mix(in srgb, #fffaf3 65%, transparent))
body.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, #fffaf3 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#fffaf3, color-mix(in srgb, #fffaf3 65%, transparent))
body.background: rgb(250, 244, 237) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(250, 244, 237) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

code.background: rgb(250, 244, 237) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-selected.mod-complex.suggestion-i.background: rgb(223, 218, 217) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(255, 250, 243) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-complex.suggestion-item.background: rgb(223, 218, 217) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(250, 244, 237) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(250, 244, 237) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(255, 250, 243) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(250, 244, 237) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

hr.background: rgb(223, 218, 217) -webkit-linear-gradient(0deg, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0), rgb(234, 157, 52), rgb(180, 99, 122), rgb(215, 130, 126), rgb(144, 122, 169), rgb(86, 148, 159), rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

hr.workspace-leaf-resize-handle.background: rgb(223, 218, 217) -webkit-linear-gradient(0deg, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0), rgb(234, 157, 52), rgb(180, 99, 122), rgb(215, 130, 126), rgb(144, 122, 169), rgb(86, 148, 159), rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(250, 244, 237) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(250, 244, 237) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(250, 244, 237) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

strong.background: rgb(180, 99, 122) linear-gradient(62deg, rgb(180, 99, 122) 0%, rgb(144, 122, 169) 100%) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box text

th.background: rgb(250, 244, 237) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
